task_name: Lazy Virtual FAL + SDIO 高頻寫入支持

progress.10-stress-test-50hz: in-progress - task priority fix applied, records moving

commits: 3923d7e Implement Lazy Virtual FAL for 2MB TSDB and fix SDIO soft-reset
342ff8a Remove per-write f_sync to reduce SDIO DMA writes, add periodic sync
6ac217b Add high-frequency ADC batch write support for ADS1298
b992e03 Add ADC simulator service for high-frequency batch write testing
1ecb2ef Fix ADC simulator priority and timing issues (disabled by default)
211368b Debug ADC simulator - fix publish logic and data handling
f61789e Add ADC simulation mode to SensorService (Scheme A)
740c3b3 Update COR+AFP+NTP documentation for Scheme A success
9000484 Disable ADC simulation after finding long-term issue
812ffea Add error tracking and sector size experiments
5855560 Update COR+AFP+NTP documentation with sector boundary bug findings
db5d2d5 Fix Lazy Virtual FAL erase: write 0xFF to disk instead of bitmap-only
dbc7fe3 Add SD write stress test decoupled from sensor data
uncommitted_changes: SdStorageServiceImpl.cpp: publish decimation + task priority +3 + debug printf

171k_phantom_records.root_cause: erase() only cleared RAM bitmap without writing 0xFF to disk. After power cycle, bitmap rebuilds as all-materialized → FlashDB sees phantom records
171k_phantom_records.fix: erase() now writes 0xFF to disk for materialized sectors

records_not_moving_at_50hz.root_cause: Task priority too low (tskIDLE_PRIORITY + 1). At 50Hz write rate, task was starved by other tasks.

observations.stuck_at_3683: Records stopped at 3683 after power cycle, but second power cycle recovered - possible FlashDB GC or transient error

test_results.erase_fix: PASS - no more phantom records across power cycles
test_results.persistence: PASS - data survives power cycle (DELETE_FDB_ON_BOOT disabled)
test_results.sd_card_format: CRITICAL - must use default allocation size (FF_MIN_SS=FF_MAX_SS=512)

next_steps.immediate: Continue long-term stability test - monitor for 3683 issue recurrence
next_steps.cleanup: Remove debug printf, commit all changes
next_steps.note: 3683 stuck issue - monitor serial log if it happens again

current_status: 50Hz stress test STABLE - 200K+ records achieved, persistence working
